title: Verify userns-uid-map and userns-gid-map input
body:
The format of the userns-uid-map and userns-gid-map fields must be
the form of a triple `ctrUid:hostUid:length` but we were not validating
that, doing a lot of useless processing, and then not even failing.

Also includes a potential fix for the abrupt lint failures in .cirrus.yml.

Addresses: #2676

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I tell you, the simpler the PR, the harder it is to get through CI.  Now this needs a rebase, 2 minutes after rebasing...
Don't merge, trying to figure out the lint issues.

@cevich with your suggested changes `gce_instance: 16Gb`, cirrus puked quickly:
```

Task Summary

Task failed!
Details

No instructions have finished!
```
@cevich, I also tried bumping the default VM's memory from 4Gb to 16Gb and got the same error as noted in my last comment.  Time for me to raise the white flag of surrender.

> cirrus puked quickly

Hrmmm, did I spell "mem" wrong?  I'll open up a separate PR to get this working...https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2682
@TomSweeneyRedHat Could you update this PR so we can get it in
